kb_knowledge.short_description: Gold Tier Warranty Coverage Policy - Full Terms and Conditions
kb_knowledge.text:
Gold Tier Warranty - 3 Year Full Coverage

Coverage Period

Gold Tier warranties provide 3 years of full coverage from date of purchase. Coverage is valid only during the active warranty period.

COVERED Items

  • Manufacturing defects - Any defect originating from the manufacturing process
  • Component failures - Internal component failures during normal use
  • Display screen damage - Screen failures, dead pixels, or display malfunctions
  • Software issues - Firmware bugs, software crashes, calibration drift
  • Battery replacement - Battery degradation below 80% capacity

NOT COVERED Items (Exclusions)

  • Water damage - Submersion, liquid spills, humidity exposure beyond rated IP level
  • Physical abuse drops - Damage from dropping, impact, crushing, or physical force
  • Unauthorized modifications - Third-party repairs, hardware mods, jailbreaking

Claim Decision Guidelines

APPROVE if: Warranty is active AND claim reason matches a COVERED item.

DENY if: Warranty is expired OR claim reason matches a NOT COVERED exclusion.

ESCALATE if: Claim reason is ambiguous or does not clearly match covered/excluded categories.
